memoryArtifacts.headline: Caerlaverock Castle (with 14th great grand daughter)
memoryArtifacts.description: Caelaverock Castle (Caerlaverock Castle is a moated triangular castle first built in the 13th century. It is located on the southern coast of Scotland, south of Dumfries, on the edge of the Caerlaverock National Nature Reserve. Caerlaverock was a stronghold of the Maxwell family from the 13th century until the 17th century when the castle was abandoned.)

zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Maxwell於1486年出生在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾凱爾拉維洛可時，她的父親John Maxwell36歲，母親Agnes Stewart , Countess of Bothwell18歲。她於大約1499年與James Johnstone of Johnstone在蘇格蘭度福利爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1515年在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾享年29歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭度福利爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Maxwell于1486年出生在英国苏格兰度福利爾凱爾拉維洛可时，她的父亲John Maxwell36岁，母亲Agnes Stewart , Countess of Bothwell18岁。她于大约1499年与James Johnstone of Johnstone在苏格兰度福利爾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1515年在英国苏格兰度福利爾享年29岁，埋葬在苏格兰度福利爾。

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

nameMeanings.name: Maxwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the Scottish surname, in origin a local name from a minor place on the River Tweed, named as ‘the stream (Old English well(a)) of Mack’. The latter is a form of Magnus . Maxwell was the middle name of the newspaper tycoon William Maxwell Aitken , Lord Beaverbrook ( 1879–1964 ), who was born in Canada, and it has been used as a given name among his descendants. It is now also frequently taken as an expansion of Max .

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Maxwell was born in 1486, in Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, John Maxwell, was 36 and her mother, Agnes Stewart , Countess of Bothwell, was 18. She married James Johnstone of Johnstone about 1499, in Dumfriesshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1515, in Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 29, and was buried in Dumfriesshire, Scotland.

fr.Johnstone, Dumfries and Galloway, Scotla: Johnstone, Dumfries and Galloway, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Maxwell est née en 1486, à Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Maxwell, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Agnes Stewart , Countess of Bothwell, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé James Johnstone of Johnstone environ 1499, à Dumfriesshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1515, à Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 29 ans, et a été enterrée à Dumfriesshire, Écosse.

de.Johnstone, Dumfries and Galloway, Scotla: Johnstone, Dumfries and Galloway, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Maxwell 1486 in Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Maxwell 36 und ihre Mutter Agnes Stewart , Countess of Bothwell 18. Sie hat um 1499 in Dumfriesshire, Scotland James Johnstone of Johnstone geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1515 im Alter von 29 Jahren in Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Dumfriesshire, Scotland begraben.

Lei sposato James Johnstone of Johnstone circa 1499, nel Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1515, nel Dumfriesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 29 anni, e fu sepolta a Dumfriesshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Maxwellが1486年にイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアケエルラバーオックで生まれた時，父John Maxwellは36歳，母Agnes Stewart , Countess of Bothwellは18歳であった。約1499年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアでJames Johnstone of Johnstoneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1515年にイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアで29歳で死去し，スコットランドダムフリーシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.Johnstone, Dumfries and Galloway, Scotla: 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리스 앤드 갈로아이 존스톤
ko.lifeSummary: Mary Maxwell(이)가 1486년 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르 카이를레이베록에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Maxwell(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Stewart , Countess of Bothwell(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 대략 1499년 스컷랜드 드프리실르에서 James Johnstone of Johnstone(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1515년 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르에서 29세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 드프리실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Maxwell nasceu em 1486, em Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Maxwell, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Stewart , Countess of Bothwell, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com James Johnstone of Johnstone aproximadamente 1499, em Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1515, em Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 29 anos, e foi sepultada em Dumfriesshire, Scotland.

ru.Johnstone, Dumfries and Galloway, Scotla: джонстоун, думфриесь анд галлоуеи, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Maxwell родилась в 1486 г. в местности каирлавирокк, думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Maxwell было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Stewart , Countess of Bothwell, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени James Johnstone of Johnstone около 1499 г. в местности думфриессхир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1515 г. в местности думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 29 лет и была похоронена в местности думфриессхир, Шотландия.

Se casó con James Johnstone of Johnstone aproximadamente 1499, en Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1515, en Dumfriesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 29 años, y fue sepultada en Dumfriesshire, Scotland.
